content: PostgreSQL RLS: USING (visibility) + WITH CHECK (write validation). Superusers, BYPASSRLS roles, and table owners bypass RLS by default (FORCE RLS needed for owners). Referential integrity (unique/PK/FK) bypasses RLS = covert channel leaks. Sub-SELECTs in policy expressions create race conditions (READ COMMITTED snapshot staleness). Partitioning by tenant_id does NOT enforce isolation without RLS or mandatory tenant filter.
